## Meeting Purpose

[Debrief and strategize on a recent client meeting with Reddit, discussing scope and approach for a potential long-term partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Reddit engagement viewed as a strategic marketing opportunity for fwd.digital, potentially worth running as a "loss leader" initially](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Team agrees to be ambitious in scope, viewing Reddit as a unique case due to brand value and growth potential](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Concerns raised about resource allocation and setting clear expectations for experimental aspects of the engagement](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Need to balance ambitious offerings with realistic guardrails and clear communication about pilot nature of some elements](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)

## Topics

### Client Meeting Reflection

  - [Initial concerns about meeting performance, but ended better than anticipated](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [Challenges in keeping client focused and managing expectations](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [Recognition of need to refine approach for similar future engagements](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Despite difficulties, team reached a good outcome with the client](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)

### Strategic Value of Reddit Partnership

  - [Reddit's brand strength makes it a uniquely valuable client](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Partnership can significantly raise fwd.digital's profile and attract other clients](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Potential to leverage Reddit association in outbound marketing (e.g., "Reddit's growth partner")](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Opportunity to run programs and webinars that benefit both Reddit and fwd.digital's growth](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Resource Allocation and Pricing Strategy

  - [Considering dedicating 2-3 full-time staff to Reddit account, despite potential initial losses](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Proposed pricing around $40k/month, with the possibility of growing to $200k/month](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Viewing Reddit engagement as part of fwd.digital's marketing budget](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Willingness to offer services beyond typical scope due to Reddit's strategic importance](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)

### Scope and Deliverables

  - [Focus on content creation, potentially 3-5,000 pages](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Email outreach capabilities, sending thousands per day](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Potential for lifecycle marketing and email automation experimentation](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [Need to clearly define guardrails for experimental aspects of engagement](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)

### Concerns and Considerations

  - [Balancing ambitious offerings with realistic expectations and resource constraints](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Importance of setting clear expectations about pilot nature of some elements](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Potential challenges in scaling dedicated resources for an experimental engagement](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [Need to ensure repeatability and profitability of services offered](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create a detailed document outlining proposed scope and deliverables for Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Clearly define guardrails for experimental aspects of the engagement](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Finalize proposal over the weekend, incorporating team input](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Prepare to ink a 4-month agreement to secure long-term partnership potential](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Explore potential for dedicated staffing while considering resource allocation challenges](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [Refine messaging around fwd.digital's capabilities and unique value proposition for Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/kyxrhHL4qjszsreiYue8SGB_Lu-Ytcet?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
